INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (UCITS MERGERS)

[ L.S.370.19

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.19
INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT
(UCITS MERGERS) REGULATIONS*
1 ta’ Lulju, 2011
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 242 tal-2011, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 336 tal2012.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
